ast.name: innerText
ast.source: Warning: this exposes plaintext headings and file structure on disk.
ast.target: 警告：这会在磁盘上暴露纯文本标题和文件结构。

ast.name: setButtonText
ast.source: Open settings to use existing key pair...
ast.target: 打开设置以使用现有密钥对...

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, each note will be encrypted upon its next modification.
ast.target: 启用后，每条笔记将在下次修改时被加密。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Specify folders whose notes should be encrypted when modified. Only notes inside these folders will be affected if 'Encrypt all notes' is disabled.
ast.target: 指定文件夹，其笔记在修改时应被加密。如果禁用了“加密所有笔记”，则只有这些文件夹内的笔记会受到影响。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, encrypted notes will be renamed with a .gpg file extension. Permanent decryption will rename files to .md extension.
ast.target: 启用后，加密的笔记将被重命名为 .gpg 文件扩展名。永久解密将把文件重命名为 .md 扩展名。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The Obsidian Core Plugin 'File Recovery' stores notes on disk. Choose the storage format.
ast.target: Obsidian 核心插件“文件恢复”会将笔记存储在磁盘上。请选择存储格式。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable this setting to use Obsidian's native metadata generation needed for features like link blocks and certain plugins (e.g., Excalidraw).
ast.target: 启用此设置以使用 Obsidian 的原生元数据生成功能，该功能是链接块和某些插件（例如 Excalidraw）所必需的。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Only native OpenPGP.js is supported on mobile devices.
ast.target: 移动设备仅支持原生 OpenPGP.js。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Native OpenPGP.js or GnuPG CLI Wrapper. The GnuPG CLI Wrapper is intended for advanced users, offering more configuration options and support for smartcards.
ast.target: 原生 OpenPGP.js 或 GnuPG CLI 包装器。GnuPG CLI 包装器面向高级用户，提供更多配置选项和智能卡支持。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Path to your public key file.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Path to your private key file.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, this setting will prompt for the passphrase for your private key during the Obsidian app startup. This works with the 'Remember Passphrase' setting, so you might be asked again depending on how long it's set to remember.
ast.target: 启用后，此设置将在 Obsidian 应用启动时提示输入私钥的密码短语。此功能与“记住密码短语”设置配合使用，因此根据设置的记忆时长，您可能会被再次询问。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Duration (in seconds) for which Obsidian remembers your private key passphrase before prompting you again. Minimum: 10 seconds. If you close or restart the app, you'll need to enter your passphrase again.
ast.target: Obsidian 记住您私钥密码短语的时长（以秒为单位），之后会再次提示您。最小值：10 秒。如果您关闭或重启应用，将需要重新输入密码短语。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, the countdown for how long your passphrase is remembered will restart every time an encrypted note is saved, preventing frequent re-entry that may occur with some other plugins.
ast.target: 启用后，每次保存加密笔记时，密码短语记忆的倒计时都会重新开始，从而防止某些其他插件可能导致的频繁重新输入。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use "--trust-model always" to trust all keys independent of the key trust.
ast.target: 使用 \"--trust-model always\" 以信任所有密钥，而不考虑密钥信任度。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When disabled then "--compression-algo none" is set.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, decrypted notes are temporarily stored in memory, allowing them to reopen faster if they remain unchanged.
ast.target: 启用后，解密的笔记会临时存储在内存中，如果笔记内容未更改，可以更快地重新打开。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, a 'Decryption in progress' dialog appears while your note is being decrypted using GnuPG CLI.
ast.target: 启用后，当您的笔记正在使用 GnuPG CLI 解密时，会出现“正在解密”对话框。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Open the welcome dialog to understand how to set up your keys.
ast.target: 打开欢迎对话框以了解如何设置您的密钥。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: File recovery format for encrypted notes
ast.target: 加密笔记的文件恢复格式

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 保存时重置密码短语超时

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Confirm the passphrase. Passphrases are different.
ast.target: 确认密码短语。密码短语不一致。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Confirm the passphrase. Passphrases are the same.
ast.target: 确认密码短语。密码短语一致。

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source: When enabled, each note will be encrypted upon its next modification.
ast.target: 启用后，每条笔记将在下次修改时被加密。

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source: When enabled, encrypted notes will be renamed with a .gpg file extension. Permanent decryption will rename files to .md extension.
ast.target: 启用后，加密的笔记将被重命名为 .gpg 文件扩展名。永久解密将把文件重命名为 .md 扩展名。

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source: Enable this setting to use Obsidian's native metadata generation needed for features like link blocks and certain plugins (e.g., Excalidraw). Warning: this exposes plaintext headings and file structure on disk.
ast.target: 启用此设置以使用 Obsidian 的原生元数据生成功能，该功能是链接块和某些插件（例如 Excalidraw）所必需的。警告：这会在磁盘上暴露明文标题和文件结构。

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source: When enabled, this setting will prompt for the passphrase for your private key during the Obsidian app startup. This works with the 'Remember Passphrase' setting, so you might be asked again depending on how long it's set to remember.
ast.target: 启用后，此设置将在 Obsidian 应用启动时提示输入私钥的密码短语。此功能与“记住密码短语”设置配合使用，因此根据设置的记忆时长，您可能会被再次询问。

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source: When enabled, the countdown for how long your passphrase is remembered will restart every time an encrypted note is saved, preventing frequent re-entry that may occur with some other plugins.
ast.target: 启用后，每次保存加密笔记时，密码短语记忆的倒计时都会重新开始，从而防止某些其他插件可能导致的频繁重新输入。

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source: Use "--trust-model always" to trust all keys independent of the key trust.
ast.target: 使用 \"--trust-model always\" 以信任所有密钥，而不考虑密钥信任度。

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source: If disabled then "--compression-algo none" is set.

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source: When enabled, decrypted notes are temporarily stored in memory, allowing them to reopen faster if they remain unchanged.
ast.target: 启用后，解密的笔记会临时存储在内存中，如果笔记内容未更改，可以更快地重新打开。

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source: When enabled, a 'Decryption in progress' dialog appears while your file is being decrypted using GnuPG CLI.
ast.target: 启用后，当您的文件正在使用 GnuPG CLI 解密时，会出现“正在解密”对话框。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Generate a new key pair with gpgCrypt and store it in your Obsidian Vault! In the event of losing either the key pair or the passphrase, anything encrypted by it will become inaccessible.
ast.target: 使用 gpgCrypt 生成新的密钥对并将其存储在您的 Obsidian 库中！如果丢失密钥对或密码短语，任何由其加密的内容都将无法访问。
